text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We're warming up before training, when...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Sigh... My legs feel kinda heavy today...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
But maybe overcoming situations like this is just
what I need to become an outstanding racer...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
My legs feel like lead... But I'll do my best... So
heavy... Gotta keep going...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Matikanetannhauser is fatigued from all
the racing she's been doing. I'll need to rethink
her race schedule.
